```{r}
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici +score, data = final)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


# using survdiff() for Log-Rank test
log_rank_test <- survdiff(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7, data = final)
log_rank_test$pvalue
```
##univariable analysis
```{r}

tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock + bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid + ici, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))


tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ Age, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))

tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ sex, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 , data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ bmi, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~  smoking, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ steroids , data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ thyroid , data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cancer_stage , data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ ecog_cat, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ dose_1, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ carbo, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))

tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ Paclitaxel, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ Pemetrexed , data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ ici, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ Gemcitabine, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))
tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ egfr_cock, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))



tbl_regression(coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ score, data = final), exponentiate = TRUE, pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))







```

#Figure 3 CIF, outcomes are grade 3 AEs, hosplitalization, hos for side effect,mortality
##exposure_cr_cys_7 : reference group is above 0.7cr/cys, exposure group as < 0.7

### for side effect
```{r}
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)
library(rms)
library(riskRegression)

# using Fine-Gray model
library(prodlim) 
outcome_model <- FGR(
  formula = Hist(cmp_time_side_effect, cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid + ici + score,
  data = final,
  cause = 1  # interested event
)

final$cr_cys_7 <- as.factor(final$cr_cys_7)
final$cmp_status_side_effect <- as.numeric(as.character(final$cmp_status_side_effect))

adjcif <- adjustedcif(data=final,
                      variable="cr_cys_7",
                      ev_time="cmp_time_side_effect",
                      event="cmp_status_side_effect",
                      method="direct",
                      outcome_model=outcome_model,
                      cause=1,
                      conf_int=TRUE)
plot(adjcif, conf_int=TRUE)

library(ggplot2)

plot_side_effect <- plot(adjcif, conf_int = TRUE) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 3) +  # line width
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 90), 
   breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15)#  
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7"),  # 
    name = "SCR/CYS" #
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7")  # 
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Hospitalization for Platinum-associated AEs",
    x = "Follow up times (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", # ，
                              hjust = 0,  # left alignment (0= left, 0.5= middle, 1= right)
                              vjust = 1,   # upper aligment(Adjust the vertical position)
                              margin = margin(t = 5, b = 10)),  
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),  #element_blank(),  # 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.position = "",  # “bottom”, “left”, “right”
    legend.background = element_blank(),  # 
    legend.key = element_blank()  # 
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), 
    limits = c(0, 0.35), 
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)  # 
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 64, y = 0.28, label = "sHR 2.50; CI 1.19-5.28", size = 20, hjust = 1)

print(plot_side_effect)
```



###for hospitalization
```{r}
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)
library(rms)
library(riskRegression)

# using fine grey model
library(prodlim) 
outcome_model <- FGR(
  formula = Hist(cmp_time_hosp, cmp_status_hosp) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid + ici + score,
  data = final,
  cause = 1  # interested event
)

final$cr_cys_7 <- as.factor(final$cr_cys_7)
final$cmp_status_hosp <- as.numeric(as.character(final$cmp_status_hosp))

adjcif <- adjustedcif(data=final,
                      variable="cr_cys_7",
                      ev_time="cmp_time_hosp",
                      event="cmp_status_hosp",
                      method="direct",
                      outcome_model=outcome_model,
                      cause=1,
                      conf_int= F)

plot(adjcif, conf_int =F )

library(ggplot2)

plot_hosp <- plot(adjcif, conf_int = F) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 3) +  # line width
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 90), 
   breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15)#  
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c(),  # "≥ 0.7", "< 0.7"
    name = "" #设置图例标题SCr/CYS
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("")  # ≥ 0.7", "< 0.7
  ) +
 
  labs(
    title = "",# "Overall hospitalization" will shown in the middle
    x = "Follow up times (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
   ggtitle("Overall hospitalization") +  # another way to set the title, will be shown in left top
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", # ，
                              hjust = 0,  # left alignment (0= left, 0.5= middle, 1= right)
                              vjust = 1,   # upper aligment(Adjust the vertical position)
                              margin = margin(t = 5, b = 10)),  # 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.title =element_text(size = 40),  #element_blank(),  # 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.position = "",  # “bottom”, “left”, “right”
    legend.background = element_blank(),  # 
    legend.key = element_blank()  # 
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), # 
    limits = c(0, 0.5), 
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)  # 
  ) +
  
  annotate("text", x = 64, y = 0.4, label = "sHR 1.64; CI 1.05-2.56", size = 20, hjust = 1)

print(plot_hosp)
```


### for grade 3 anemia
```{r}
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)
library(rms)
library(riskRegression)

# using Fine-Gray model
library(prodlim) 
outcome_model <- FGR(
  formula = Hist(cmp_time_anemia_3, cmp_status_anemia_3) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid + pre_HGB_45days + ici + score,
  data = final,
  cause = 1  # interested event
)

final$cr_cys_7 <- as.factor(final$cr_cys_7)
final$cmp_status_anemia_3 <- as.numeric(as.character(final$cmp_status_anemia_3))

adjcif <- adjustedcif(data=final,
                      variable="cr_cys_7",
                      ev_time="cmp_time_anemia_3",
                      event="cmp_status_anemia_3",
                      method="direct",
                      outcome_model=outcome_model,
                      cause=1,
                      conf_int=TRUE)
plot(adjcif, conf_int=TRUE)

library(ggplot2)

plot_anemia_3 <- plot(adjcif, conf_int = TRUE) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 3) +  # line width
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 90), 
   breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15)#  
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7"),  # 
    name = "SCR/CYS" #
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7")  # 
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Grade ≥ 3 Anemia",
    x = "Follow up times (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", #，
                              hjust = 0,  # left alignment (0= left, 0.5= middle, 1= right)
                              vjust = 1,   # upper aligment(Adjust the vertical position)
                              margin = margin(t = 5, b = 10)),  
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),  #element_blank(),  # 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.position = "",  # “bottom”, “left”, “right”
    legend.background = element_blank(),  # 
    legend.key = element_blank()  # remove background
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), 
    limits = c(0, 0.35), 
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)  # 
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 64, y = 0.29, label = "sHR 2.66; CI 1.44-4.89", size = 20, hjust = 1)
print(plot_anemia_3)
```


### for grade 3 thrombocytopenia
```{r}
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)
library(rms)
library(riskRegression)

# using Fine-Gray model
library(prodlim) 
outcome_model <- FGR(
  formula = Hist(cmp_time_throm_3, cmp_status_throm_3) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid + pre_PLT_45days + ici + score,
  data = final,
  cause = 1  # interested event
)

final$cr_cys_7 <- as.factor(final$cr_cys_7)
final$cmp_status_throm_3 <- as.numeric(as.character(final$cmp_status_throm_3))

adjcif <- adjustedcif(data=final,
                      variable="cr_cys_7",
                      ev_time="cmp_time_throm_3",
                      event="cmp_status_throm_3",
                      method="direct",
                      outcome_model=outcome_model,
                      cause=1,
                      conf_int=TRUE)
plot(adjcif, conf_int=TRUE)

library(ggplot2)

plot_throm_3 <- plot(adjcif, conf_int = TRUE) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 3) +  # line width
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 90), 
   breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15)#  
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7"),  # 
    name = "SCR/CYS" #
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7")  # 
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Grade ≥ 3 Thrombocytopenia",
    x = "Follow up times (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", # ，
                              hjust = 0,  # left alignment (0= left, 0.5= middle, 1= right)
                              vjust = 1,   # upper aligment(Adjust the vertical position)
                              margin = margin(t = 5, b = 10)),  
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),  #element_blank(),  # 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.position = "",  # “bottom”, “left”, “right”
    legend.background = element_blank(),  # 
    legend.key = element_blank()  # 
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), 
    limits = c(0, 0.2), 
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)  # 
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 64, y = 0.165, label = "sHR 6.58; CI 1.90-22.8", size = 20, hjust = 1)
print(plot_throm_3)
```




### for grade 3 aki
```{r}
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)
library(rms)
library(riskRegression)

# using Fine-Gray model
library(prodlim) 
outcome_model <- FGR(
  formula = Hist(cmp_time_aki_3, cmp_status_aki_3) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid + ici + score,
  data = final,
  cause = 1  # interested event
)

final$cr_cys_7 <- as.factor(final$cr_cys_7)
final$cmp_status_aki_3 <- as.numeric(as.character(final$cmp_status_aki_3))

adjcif <- adjustedcif(data=final,
                      variable="cr_cys_7",
                      ev_time="cmp_time_aki_3",
                      event="cmp_status_aki_3",
                      method="direct",
                      outcome_model=outcome_model,
                      cause=1,
                      conf_int=TRUE)
plot(adjcif, conf_int=TRUE)

library(ggplot2)

plot_aki_3 <- plot(adjcif, conf_int = TRUE) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 3) +  # line width
   scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 90), 
   breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15)#  
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7"),  # 
    name = "SCR/CYS" #
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # 
    labels = c("≥ 0.7", "< 0.7")  # 
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Grade ≥ 3 Creatinine Increased",
    x = "Follow up times (Days)",
    y = "Cumulative Incidence"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", # ，
                              hjust = 0,  # left alignment (0= left, 0.5= middle, 1= right)
                              vjust = 1,   # upper aligment(Adjust the vertical position)
                              margin = margin(t = 5, b = 10)),  
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),  #element_blank(),  # 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 40),  # 
    legend.position = "",  # “bottom”, “left”, “right”
    legend.background = element_blank(),  # 
    legend.key = element_blank()  # 
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), 
    limits = c(0, 0.06), 
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)  # 
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 64, y = 0.05, label = "sHR 4.46; CI 0.32-61.7", size = 20, hjust = 1)
print(plot_aki_3)
```



#1-KM curve

```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

surv_fit_90d <- survfit(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7, data = final)
# Fit a Cox proportional hazards model
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid+ ici+score, data = final)


plot_death <- ggsurvplot(
   surv_fit_90d, # survfit object with calculated statistics.
   fun = "event", # 1-KM curve （1 - survival）
   data = final,                    # data used to fit survival curves. 
   risk.table = F,                # show risk table.
   risk.table.type = "cumevents",  # 
   pval = F,                      # show p-value of log-rank test.
   conf.int = F,                     # hide or show confidence intervals.
   xlim = c(0, 90),                  # narrower X axis.
   break.time.by = 15,               # break X axis in time intervals.
   risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,     # color risk table text annotations.
   risk.table.y.text = TRUE,         # show bars instead of names in legend of risk table.
   risk.table.height = 0.3,
   risk.table.fontsize = 6,
 #  ylim = c(0, 0.25),                 # Y axis limits
 #  break.y.by = 0.2,                 # break Y axis by 0.2.
   surv.scale = "percent", # Y axis in percent.
   title = "Mortality ", #  
   legend = c(15, 0.15),             # legend position.
   legend.title = "",                # legend title.
   legend.labs = c("SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7","SCr/CYS < 0.7"), # legend labels.
   font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     
   xlab = "Follow up time (days)",   # x-axis label.
   palette = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),  # custom color palette.
   size = 3
)

plot_death$plot <- plot_death$plot + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),limits = c(0, 0.2) )+
  annotate("text", x = 60, y = 0.08, label = "", size = 10, hjust = 1)+
  annotate("text", x = 65, y = 0.165, label = "aHR 3.76; CI 1.15-12.3", size = 20, hjust = 1)+
  ggtitle("Mortality") +  # 
theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", color = "black"),        # Title
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold.italic", color = "purple"),  # Subtitle
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 40, face = "plain", color = "orange"),    # Caption
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # X-axis label
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # Y-axis label
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "plain", color = "black"),      # X-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40, face = "plain")                        # Y-axis tick labels
  )
print(plot_death)
```


```{r}
## for risk table of 1-KM, this is basic code
ggrisktable(
  surv_fit_90d,
  data = final,
  risk.table.type = c("absolute", "percentage", "abs_pct", "nrisk_cumcensor",
    "nrisk_cumevents")
)

ggcumevents(surv_fit_90d, data = final)

ggcumcensor(surv_fit_90d, data = final)

##this is formatted code
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)
 ggsurvtable(
  surv_fit_90d,
  data = final,
  survtable = c("cumevents"),#"cumcensor" or "risk.table"
  risk.table.type = c("nrisk_cumevents"),# we can choose "absolute", "percentage", "abs_pct", "nrisk_cumcensor"
  title = NULL,
  risk.table.title = NULL,
  cumevents.title = NULL,
  cumcensor.title = NULL,
  color = "strata",
  palette = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),
  break.time.by = 20,
  xlim = c(0,90),
  xscale = 1,
  xlab = "Follow up time (days)",
  ylab = "",
  xlog = FALSE,
  legend = "none",# can choose top
  legend.title = "", # can write "Strata" or anything
  legend.labs = c("SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7", "SCr/CYS < 0.7"),
  y.text = TRUE,
  y.text.col = TRUE,
  fontsize = 4.5,
  font.family = "",
  axes.offset = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_survminer()
)

```

# using plot_grid to creat one plot
```{r}
# using plot_grid to creat one plot
library(cowplot)
combined_plot_2 <- plot_grid(plot_side_effect,plot_hosp,plot_death$plot, plot_anemia_3,plot_throm_3,plot_aki_3,nrow = 2)

print (combined_plot_2) #save as 4000 * 2000

```


# Figure 5 one year mortality - KM curve(will decide whether use it finally)

```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

```

## for 90d mortality with cr/cys <0.7 
```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

surv_fit_90d <- survfit(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7, data = final)
# Fit a Cox proportional hazards model
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid+ ici+score, data = final)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


# using survdiff() for Log-Rank test
log_rank_test <- survdiff(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7, data = final)
log_rank_test$pvalue

# Plot survival curves :simple survival analysis without covariants
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(survminer)
library(scales)
# Create the survfit object
```

```{r}
# Generate the ggsurvplot object

ggsurv <- ggsurvplot(
   surv_fit_90d,                     # survfit object with calculated statistics.
   data = final,                    # data used to fit survival curves. 
   risk.table = T,                # show risk table.
   pval = TRUE,                      # show p-value of log-rank test.
   conf.int = FALSE,                 # hide confidence intervals.
   xlim = c(0, 90),                  # narrower X axis.
   break.time.by = 10,               # break X axis in time intervals.
   risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,     # color risk table text annotations.
   risk.table.y.text = TRUE,         # show bars instead of names in legend of risk table.
   risk.table.height = 0.3,
   risk.table.fontsize = 6,
   ylim = c(0.8, 1),                 # Y axis limits
   break.y.by = 0.2,                 # break Y axis by 0.2.
   surv.scale = "percent", # Y axis in percent.
   title = "", #  
   legend = c(0.2, 0.25),             # legend position.
   legend.title = "",                # legend title.
   legend.labs = c("SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7","SCr/CYS < 0.7"), # legend labels.
   font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     
   xlab = "Follow up time (days)",   # x-axis label.
   palette = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF")  # custom color palette.
)

ggsurv$plot <- ggsurv$plot + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0.8, 1))+
  annotate("text", x = 80, y = 0.83, label = "Log-rank p value < 0.001", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  annotate("text", x = 78, y = 0.85, label = "HR 3.76; CI 1.15-12.30", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  ggtitle("") +  # 
theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),        # Title
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold.italic", color = "purple"),  # Subtitle
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 20, face = "plain", color = "orange"),    # Caption
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # X-axis label
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # Y-axis label
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain", color = "black"),      # X-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain")                        # Y-axis tick labels
  )


ggsurv$table <- ggsurv$table + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black")# risk table x axis font and size
  )
print(ggsurv$plot) #save as 900* 600
print(ggsurv$table) # save as 950*200
```
## how many patients lost follow up
```{r}

final <- final %>%
  mutate(
    lost_follow_up = as.factor(ifelse(mortality_90 == 0 & follow_up_time < 90, 1, 0))
  )
table(final$lost_follow_up)

```


##KM curve for cr_cys_cat ("< 0.5","0.5-0.7","0.7-0.9","≥ 0.9")


```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

surv_fit_90d_cat <- survfit(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_cat, data = final)
# Fit a Cox proportional hazards model
cox_model_cat <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine  +thyroid+ ici+score, data = final)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model_cat)
tbl_cox_cat <- tbl_regression(cox_model_cat, exponentiate = TRUE,,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox_cat


# 
log_rank_test <- survdiff(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_cat, data = final)
log_rank_test$pvalue

```

```{r}
# Generate the ggsurvplot object

ggsurv <- ggsurvplot(
   surv_fit_90d_cat,                     # survfit object with calculated statistics.
   data = final,                    # data used to fit survival curves. 
   risk.table = T,                # show risk table.
   pval = TRUE,                      # show p-value of log-rank test.
   conf.int = FALSE,                 # hide confidence intervals.
   xlim = c(0, 90),                  # narrower X axis.
   break.time.by = 10,               # break X axis in time intervals.
   risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,     # color risk table text annotations.
   risk.table.y.text = TRUE,         # show bars instead of names in legend of risk table.
   risk.table.height = 0.3,
   risk.table.fontsize = 6,
   ylim = c(0.8, 1),                 # Y axis limits
   break.y.by = 0.2,                 # break Y axis by 0.2.
   surv.scale = "percent", # Y axis in percent.
   title = "Figure", # 2 ways to create plot title
   legend = c(0.2, 0.25),             # legend position.
   legend.title = "SCR/CYS",                # legend title.
   legend.labs = c("< 0.5","0.5-0.7","0.7-0.9","≥ 0.9"), # legend labels."SCr/CYS < 0.5",SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7"
   font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     
   xlab = "Follow up time (days)",   # x-axis label.
   palette = c("#d62728","#ff7f0e","#e377c2","#1f77b4")  # custom color palette.
)

ggsurv$plot <- ggsurv$plot + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0.8, 1))+
  annotate("text", x = 70, y = 0.83, label = "Log rank P value < 0.001", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  #annotate("text", x = 78, y = 0.85, label = "L", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  ggtitle("Figure") +  # 
theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),        # Title
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold.italic", color = "purple"),  # Subtitle
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 20, face = "plain", color = "orange"),    # Caption
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # X-axis label
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # Y-axis label
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain", color = "black"),      # X-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain")                        # Y-axis tick labels
  )


ggsurv$table <- ggsurv$table + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black")# 设置风险表 x 轴刻度标签字体大小
  )
print(ggsurv)
```


##for 1-KM curve (used in Figure 3 CIF )
```{r}
ggsurv <- ggsurvplot(
   surv_fit_90d, # survfit object with calculated statistics.
   fun = "event", # 1-KM curve shouwing cumulative incidense（1 - survival）
   data = final,                    # data used to fit survival curves. 
   risk.table = F,                # show risk table.
   risk.table.type = "cumevents",  # showing cumulative event,but didn't work
   pval = TRUE,                      # show p-value of log-rank test.
   conf.int = T,                     # hide or show confidence intervals.
   xlim = c(0, 90),                  # narrower X axis.
   break.time.by = 10,               # break X axis in time intervals.
   risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,     # color risk table text annotations.
   risk.table.y.text = TRUE,         # show bars instead of names in legend of risk table.
   risk.table.height = 0.3,
   risk.table.fontsize = 6,
   ylim = c(0, 0.2),                 # Y axis limits
   break.y.by = 0.2,                 # break Y axis by 0.2.
   surv.scale = "percent", # Y axis in percent.
   title = "Figure ", # 
   legend = c(15, 0.15),             # legend position.
   legend.title = "",                # legend title.
   legend.labs = c("SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7","SCr/CYS < 0.7"), # legend labels.
   font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     
   xlab = "Follow up time (days)",   # x-axis label.
   palette = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF")  # custom color palette.
)

ggsurv$plot <- ggsurv$plot + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 0.2))+
  annotate("text", x = 15, y = 0.1, label = "Log-rank p value < 0.001", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  annotate("text", x = 15, y = 0.05, label = "HR 6.61; CI 2.27-19.20", size = 6, hjust = 1)+
  ggtitle("Figure B") +  # 
theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),        # Title
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold.italic", color = "purple"),  # Subtitle
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 20, face = "plain", color = "orange"),    # Caption
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # X-axis label
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", color = "black"),      # Y-axis label
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain", color = "black"),      # X-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain")                        # Y-axis tick labels
  )
print(ggsurv)

## for risk table of 1-KM, this is basic code
ggrisktable(
  surv_fit_90d,
  data = final,
  risk.table.type = c("absolute", "percentage", "abs_pct", "nrisk_cumcensor",
    "nrisk_cumevents")
)

ggcumevents(surv_fit_90d, data = final)

ggcumcensor(surv_fit_90d, data = final)

##this is formatted code
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)
 ggsurvtable(
  surv_fit_90d,
  data = final,
  survtable = c("cumevents"),#"cumcensor" or "risk.table"
  risk.table.type = c("nrisk_cumevents"),# we can choose "absolute", "percentage", "abs_pct", "nrisk_cumcensor"
  title = NULL,
  risk.table.title = NULL,
  cumevents.title = NULL,
  cumcensor.title = NULL,
  color = "strata",
  palette = c("#3B4992FF","#BB0021FF"),
  break.time.by = 10,
  xlim = c(0,90),
  xscale = 1,
  xlab = "Follow up time (days)",
  ylab = "",
  xlog = FALSE,
  legend = "none",# can choose top
  legend.title = "", # can write "Strata" or anything
  legend.labs = c("SCr/CYS ≥ 0.7", "SCr/CYS < 0.7"),
  y.text = TRUE,
  y.text.col = TRUE,
  fontsize = 4.5,
  font.family = "",
  axes.offset = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_survminer()
)

```



# Figure 4: competing risk model for subgroup(ecog as 2 groups)
```{r}
final <- final %>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = ifelse(as.numeric(as.character(ecog_values)) < 1, 0, 1))%>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = as.factor(ecog_cat))
table(final$ecog_cat)
```

##for age subgroup

```{r}

final_0_65 <- final%>%
  filter(Age  < 65)

library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)
##outcomes should be factors


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid + ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_0_65) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_0_65) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days + thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_0_65) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_0_65)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```  


```{r}

final_65_90 <- final%>%
  filter(Age >= 65)

library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)
##outcomes should be factors

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_65_90) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_65_90) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_65_90) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_65_90)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```  

##subgroup for males/femates: deleted variable of sex
```{r}
final_male <- final%>%
  filter(sex == 1 )

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age +  egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_male) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_male) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_male) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_male)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```

```{r}
final_female <- final%>%
  filter(sex == 0 )

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age +  egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_female) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_female) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_female) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age  + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_female)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```

```{r}
final_egfr_above_60 <- final%>%
  filter(egfr_cock >= 60)

library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)
##outcomes should be factors

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_above_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_above_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine +pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_above_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_egfr_above_60)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


```  

```{r}
final_egfr_less_60 <- final%>%
  filter(egfr_cock < 60)

library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)
##outcomes should be factors

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_less_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_less_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex +  bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine +pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_egfr_less_60) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_egfr_less_60)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```  

##subgroup for BMI
```{r}

final_bmi_below_25 <- final %>%
  filter(bmi < 25) 

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_below_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_below_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_below_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_bmi_below_25)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


```
```{r}
final_bmi_above_25 <- final %>%
  filter(bmi >= 25) 

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_above_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_above_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_bmi_above_25) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_bmi_above_25)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```


##subgroup for cancer type
```{r}
table(final$cancer_retype)

final_thoracic <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 1)

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_thoracic) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_thoracic) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_thoracic) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_thoracic)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```



```{r}
final_breast <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 2) ## don't have male patients,all use carboplatin and steroids,high dose, no Paclitaxel,   Pemetrexed,Gemcitabine, thyroid

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_breast) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age  + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_breast) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_breast) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ ici+score, data = final_breast)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```

```{r}
final_GI <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 3)

summary(final_GI[, c("cr_cys_7", "Age", "sex", "egfr_cock", "bmi",  "smoking", "steroids", "cancer_stage", "ecog_cat",  "dose_1", "carbo", "Paclitaxel", "Pemetrexed",  "Gemcitabine", "pre_HGB_45days", "pre_PLT_45days")])  #no Pemetrexed
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel  + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GI) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GI) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GI) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid +ici+score, data = final_GI)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```

```{r}
final_GU <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 4)
summary(final_GU[, c("cr_cys_7", "Age", "sex", "egfr_cock", "bmi",  "smoking", "steroids", "cancer_stage", "ecog_cat",  "dose_1", "carbo", "Paclitaxel", "Pemetrexed",  "Gemcitabine", "pre_HGB_45days", "pre_PLT_45days")])  # all cr_cys ≥ 0.7
```

```{r}
final_GYN <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 5)

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GYN) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GYN) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_GYN) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_GYN)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```


```{r}
final_HEENT <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_retype == 6)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid + ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_HEENT) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_HEENT) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_HEENT) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid + ici+score, data = final_HEENT)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```


##subgroup for cancer stage

```{r}

final_early <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_stage == 1 )

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_early) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_early) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_early) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_early)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


```


```{r}
final_advanced <- final%>%
  filter(cancer_stage == 2 )
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_advanced) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_advanced) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_advanced) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_advanced)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```


##subgroup for high dose low dose, the defination is carbo-AUC ≥ 5 mg/mL/min, or r cisplatin  ≥ 75 mg/m2

```{r}
final_low_dose_1 <- final%>%
  filter(dose_1 == 0)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids+ cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed +Gemcitabine + thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_low_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_low_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days+ pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_low_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids+ cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed +Gemcitabine + thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_low_dose_1)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox

```


```{r}
final_high_dose_1 <- final%>%
  filter(dose_1 ==1)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids+ cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed +Gemcitabine + thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_high_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_high_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days+ pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final_high_dose_1) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ cr_cys_7 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids+ cancer_stage + ecog_cat+ carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed +Gemcitabine + thyroid+ ici+score, data = final_high_dose_1)
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox



```






#sensitivity analysis: 3 exposures with grade 2\3 AEs,hos,hos for side effect,mortality
#creating forest plot

##for HR of cre/cys,adjusted for 

#Demographics: age, sex
#markers of kidney function: GFR by Cockcroft equation(most oncologist use for creatinine clearance  instead of combined EPI equation)
#non-GFR determinants of cystatin C: BMI, smoking status, corticosteroid use, and thyroid disease.
#Medical comorbidities:Cancer stage?, Charlson comorbidity index, Ecog, high/low platin dose; carbo/cis; platinum partners including paclitaxel, pemetrexed, gemcitabine.
#baseline lab result?


```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)


final$ecog_values <- as.factor(final$ecog_values)
final$ecog_values
##outcomes should be factors
##ecog_values affect a lot



final <- final %>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = ifelse(as.numeric(as.character(ecog_values)) < 1, 0, 1))%>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = as.factor(ecog_cat))
table(final$ecog_cat)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid + ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids +  cancer_stage +ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ pre_HGB_45days+ thyroid + ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine +pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_2_aes,cmp_status_grade_2_aes)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ exposure_epi_30+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

```
##unvariable analysis
```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)


final$ecog_values <- as.factor(final$ecog_values)
final$ecog_values
##outcomes should be factors
##ecog_values affect a lot



final <- final %>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = ifelse(as.numeric(as.character(ecog_values)) < 1, 0, 1))%>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = as.factor(ecog_cat))
table(final$ecog_cat)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_2_aes,cmp_status_grade_2_aes)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ exposure_epi_30,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

```


## for 90d mortality with 30 % discrepancy
```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

surv_fit_90d <- survfit(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_epi_30, data = final)
# Fit a Cox proportional hazards model
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_epi_30 + Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + thyroid + ici+score, data = final)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


# using survdiff() for Log-Rank test
log_rank_test <- survdiff(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_epi_30, data = final)
log_rank_test$pvalue
```

##for HR of 15% discrepancy,adjusted for 

#Demographics: age, sex
#markers of kidney function: GFR by Cockcroft equation(most oncologist use for creatinine clearance  instead of combined EPI equation)
#non-GFR determinants of cystatin C: BMI, smoking status, corticosteroid use, and thyroid disease.
#Medical comorbidities:Cancer stage?, Charlson comorbidity index, Ecog, high/low platin dose; carbo/cis; platinum partners including paclitaxel, pemetrexed, gemcitabine.
#baseline lab result?


```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)


final$ecog_values <- as.factor(final$ecog_values)
final$ecog_values
##outcomes should be factors
##ecog_values affect a lot



final <- final %>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = ifelse(as.numeric(as.character(ecog_values)) < 1, 0, 1))%>%
  mutate(ecog_cat = as.factor(ecog_cat))
table(final$ecog_cat)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids  + cancer_stage  +  ecog_cat +dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids +  cancer_stage +ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ pre_HGB_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine +pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_2_aes,cmp_status_grade_2_aes)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine + pre_HGB_45days + pre_PLT_45days+ thyroid+ ici+score,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
```

##univariable analysis
```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(tidycmprsk)

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_2_aes,cmp_status_grade_2_aes)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_grade_3_aes,cmp_status_grade_3_aes)  ~ exposure_cg_15,failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
```




## for 90d mortality with 15 % discrepancy
```{r}
library(survival)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))

surv_fit_90d <- survfit(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_cg_15, data = final)
# Fit a Cox proportional hazards model
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_cg_15+ Age + sex + egfr_cock+ bmi + smoking + steroids + cancer_stage + ecog_cat + dose_1 + carbo + Paclitaxel + Pemetrexed + Gemcitabine+ thyroid+ ici+score, data = final)

# View the summary of the Cox model
summary(cox_model)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox_model, exponentiate = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox


# using survdiff() for Log-Rank test
log_rank_test <- survdiff(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ exposure_cg_15, data = final)
log_rank_test$pvalue
```







#Dose difference analysis
#-	dose administered minus the calculated dose for carboplatin (unindexed eGFR CRE-CYS)
#-	Quartiles of dose difference 

#Histogram of dose difference --- one histogram for people who got toxicity, one who didn’t get tox

```{r}
#recalculated carbo dose using unindexed cock-croft equation
#creatinine capped as 0.7,CrCl apped as 125ml/min

Cockcroft_capped <- function(age, weight, male, cre) {
  # when creatinine < 0.7 ，set the creatinine as 0.7
  adjusted_cre <- ifelse(cre < 0.7, 0.7, cre)
  
  # base on gender 
  if (male == 0) {
    value <- (140 - age) * weight * 0.85 / (72 * adjusted_cre)
  } else {
    value <- (140 - age) * weight / (72 * adjusted_cre)
  }
  
  return(value)
}


final$egfr_cock_capped <- mapply(Cockcroft_capped,final$Age,final$weight,final$male,final$baseline_cre) 


final <- final%>%
  mutate(carbo_dose_cal_cock = case_when(
       egfr_cock_capped<= 125 ~ carbo_AUC * (egfr_cock_capped + 25),
       egfr_cock_capped > 125 ~ carbo_AUC * 150
       ))



## reclculated  capped egfr based on creatinine and cystatin function without race, then unindexed it, and calculating cardo dose using capped egfr based on creatinine and cystatin

library(nephro)
final <- final%>%
  mutate(baseline_cre_capped = ifelse(baseline_cre< 0.7,0.7,baseline_cre))
           
final$egfr_cystatin_cre_capped = CKDEpi_RF.creat.cys(final$baseline_cre_capped,final$baseline_cystatin_c,final$sex,final$Age)

# unindexed the egfr
final$egfr_cystatin_cre_capped_unindex = final$egfr_cystatin_cre_capped * final$BSA / 1.73
# calculated carbo dose

final <- final%>%
  mutate(carbo_dose_cal_cre_cys_unindexed = case_when(
       egfr_cystatin_cre_capped_unindex<= 125 ~ carbo_AUC * (egfr_cystatin_cre_capped_unindex + 25),
       egfr_cystatin_cre_capped_unindex > 125 ~ carbo_AUC * 150
       ))

```

```{r}
final$carbo_dose_diff_cock <- final$carbo_dose - final$carbo_dose_cal_cre_cys_unindexed

final <- final %>%
  mutate(carbo_ratio = carbo_dose / carbo_dose_cal_cre_cys_unindexed) %>%
  mutate(carbo_dose_diff_cat = case_when(
    carbo_ratio > 1.2 ~ 1,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.2 & carbo_ratio > 1.1 ~ 2,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.1 & carbo_ratio > 0.9 ~ 3,
    carbo_ratio <= 0.9 & carbo_ratio > 0.8 ~ 4,
    carbo_ratio <= 0.8  ~ 5
  ))

 

table(final$carbo_dose_diff_cat)
table(final$carbo)






ggplot(final, aes(x = carbo_dose_diff_cat)) +
  geom_bar(aes(y = (..count..)/sum(..count..)),
           fill = "#3B4992FF",
           stat = "count") + # 
  geom_text(stat = "count", 
            aes(label = scales::percent(..count../sum(..count..), accuracy = 0.1),
                y = (..count..)/sum(..count..)), 
            vjust = -0.5) + # 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1)) + # 
  labs(title = "carbo dose difference distribution", x = "carbo dose difference", y = "Percentage (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) + # 
  scale_fill_identity() + # 
  theme_classic()


library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 
final <- final %>%
  mutate(
    carbo_dose_diff_cat_label = case_when(
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 1 ~ "> 1.2",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 2 ~ "1.1-1.2",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 3 ~ "0.9-1.1",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 4 ~ "0.8-0.9",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 5 ~ "≤ 0.8"
    )# 
  )

final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_label = factor(
      final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_label,
      levels = c("≤ 0.8", "0.8-0.9", "0.9-1.1", "1.1-1.2", "> 1.2")
    )
  



final_carbo <- final%>%
  filter(carbo == 1)
# 
ggplot(final_carbo, aes(x = carbo_dose_diff_cat_label)) +
  geom_bar(aes(y = (..count..)/sum(..count..)),  
           fill = ifelse(carbo_dose_diff_cat_label %in% c("> 1.2"),"#BB0021FF", "#3B4992FF"),
           stat = "count") + # 
  geom_text(stat = "count", 
            aes(label = scales::percent(..count../sum(..count..), accuracy = 0.1),
                y = (..count..)/sum(..count..)), 
            vjust = -0.5) + # 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1)) + # 
  labs(title = "", x = "carbo dose / carboplatin dose calculated by adjusted eGFR CKD-EPI", y = "Percentage (%)") +
```
