```{r}
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) + # 
  scale_fill_identity() + # 
  theme_classic()

  

  
##generate new cat
final <- final %>%
  mutate(carbo_ratio = carbo_dose / carbo_dose_cal_cre_cys_unindexed) %>%
  mutate(carbo_dose_diff_cat = case_when(
    carbo_ratio > 1.25 ~ 1,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.25 & carbo_ratio > 1.2 ~ 2,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.2 & carbo_ratio > 1.15 ~ 3,
     carbo_ratio <= 1.15 & carbo_ratio > 1.1 ~ 4,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.1 & carbo_ratio > 1.05 ~ 5,
    carbo_ratio <= 1.05 & carbo_ratio > 0.95 ~ 6,
     carbo_ratio <= 0.95 & carbo_ratio > 0.90 ~ 7,
     carbo_ratio <= 0.9 & carbo_ratio > 0.85 ~8,
     carbo_ratio <= 0.85 & carbo_ratio > 0.8 ~ 9,
     carbo_ratio <= 0.8 & carbo_ratio > 0.75 ~ 10,
     carbo_ratio <= 0.75  ~ 11
  ))


final <- final %>%
  mutate(
    carbo_dose_diff_cat_label = case_when(
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 1 ~ "> 25% overdose",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 2 ~ "20-25% overdose",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 3 ~ "15-20% overdose",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 4 ~ "10-15% overdose",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 5 ~ "5-10% overdose",
      carbo_dose_diff_cat == 6 ~ "appropriately dosed",
       carbo_dose_diff_cat == 7 ~ "5-10% underdose",
       carbo_dose_diff_cat == 8 ~ "10-15%  underdose",
       carbo_dose_diff_cat == 9 ~ "15-20% underdose",
       carbo_dose_diff_cat == 10 ~ "20-25% underdose",
       carbo_dose_diff_cat == 11 ~ "> 25% underdose"
    )
  )




table(final$carbo_dose_diff_cat)

final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_label = factor(
      final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_label,
      levels = c( "> 25% underdose","20-25% underdose","15-20% underdose","10-15%  underdose","5-10% underdose","appropriately dosed","5-10% overdose","10-15% overdose","15-20% overdose","20-25% overdose","> 25% overdose")
    )
  

final_carbo <- final%>%
  filter(carbo == 1)
# 
ggplot(final_carbo, aes(x = carbo_dose_diff_cat_label)) +
  geom_bar(aes(y = (..count..)/sum(..count..),  
               fill = ifelse(carbo_dose_diff_cat_label %in% c("> 25% overdose", "20-25% overdose","15-20% overdose"),"#BB0021FF", "#3B4992FF")),
           stat = "count") + # 
  geom_text(stat = "count", 
            aes(label = scales::percent(..count../sum(..count..), accuracy = 0.1),
                y = (..count..)/sum(..count..)), 
            vjust = -0.5) + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 1), 
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), # 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16), # 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16), # 
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20) # 
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Figure A", x = "", y = "Percentage (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) + # 
  scale_fill_identity() + # 
  theme_classic()


# 
ggplot(final, aes(x = carbo_ratio)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 0.05, 
    color = "black", 
    fill = "darkblue", 
    aes(y = ..count.. / sum(..count..) * 100)  # 
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percentage (%)", labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +  # 
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.55, 0.7, 0.85, 1, 1.15, 1.3, 1.45))+
  labs(title = "Distribution of Carbo Ratio", 
       x = "Carbo Ratio") +  # 
  theme_classic() +  # 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),  # 
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),  # 
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)  # 
  )




```

##AEs:setting carbo _dose_diff as 5 groups

```{r}
final <- final %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(cmp_status_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_3,cmp_status_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_3,cmp_status_neutro_2,cmp_status_neutro_3,cmp_status_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_3), as.factor))

```
```{r}
final <- final %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    carbo_dose_diff_cat = relevel(as.factor(carbo_dose_diff_cat), ref = "3")
  ) # setting group 3 as reference group
levels(final$carbo_dose_diff_cat)


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat+ Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat + Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_neutro_2,cmp_status_neutro_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat + Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat + Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat + Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(follow_up_time = last_follow_up_date - Baseline_sample_Date)
final=final%>%mutate(death_follow_up_time_90d=ifelse(death_90==2&follow_up_time<=90,follow_up_time,90))

final <- final%>%
  mutate(mortality_90 = ifelse(death_90==2,1,0))


cox <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat, data = final)


```


#combing cat as 2 groups: > 15% and ≤ 15%
```{r}

final <- final %>%
  mutate(carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 = ifelse(carbo_ratio > 1.15 , 1, 0))
  
table(final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15)

final <- final %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 = relevel(as.factor(carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15), ref = "0")
  ) # setting group 3 as reference group
levels(final$carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15)


final <- final %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(cmp_status_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_3,cmp_status_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_3,cmp_status_neutro_2,cmp_status_neutro_3,cmp_status_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_3), as.factor))



tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_2,cmp_status_anemia_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15+ Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_anemia_3,cmp_status_anemia_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15+ Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_2,cmp_status_throm_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_throm_3,cmp_status_throm_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15+ Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_neutro_2,cmp_status_neutro_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_neutro_2,cmp_status_neutro_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_2,cmp_status_aki_2) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_aki_3,cmp_status_aki_3) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15+ Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_hosp,cmp_status_hosp) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15+ Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))


tidycmprsk::crr(Surv(cmp_time_side_effect,cmp_status_side_effect) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male, failcode=1,cencode=0, data = final) %>% tbl_regression(exp = TRUE,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))

cox <- coxph(Surv(death_follow_up_time_90d, mortality_90) ~ carbo_dose_diff_cat_2_15 + Age + male+ cancer_stage + score, data = final)
tbl_cox <- tbl_regression(cox, exponentiate = TRUE,,pvalue_fun = function(x) style_pvalue(x, digits = 3))
tbl_cox
```
